issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in post-referral workflow
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred continued to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of unenrolling. The workflow filter logic did not include Closed Lost and Transferred statuses as exit criteria. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters to resolve it.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any stray check-in tasks received on deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails sending with previous loan officer's info after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the old LO rather than the updated one. The issue was identified as a product-side integration problem rather than a workflow configuration issue. Luis resolved it on the product/backend side.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO changed during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing agent emails reflect the correct LO and resend if necessary.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then set to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow and associated tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that deal stage 'Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger to fix the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted and did not receive TC tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling into TC workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals marked as Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow or generating TC tasks. The root cause was not fully confirmed but was investigated with HubSpot support, who identified a fix. MRC deals typically have no loan officer assigned, which may have been a contributing factor.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window and send closing info collection emails manually.
